name: Cha Thai (Iced Tea)
recipeIngredient: Sugar or Sweetened Condensed Milk to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the tea in a coffee filter within a drip cone.
Preheat carafe with boiling water; discard the water. Pour 6 ounces of boiling water per serving into the cone and allow it to drip through. Transfer the brewed tea to another container, then pour back through the filter. Repeat until the tea is deep red in color, approximately 4 to 6 times.
2. Sweeten the tea to taste with sugar or sweetened condensed milk.
Fill tall glasses with ice cubes and add tea to fill the glasses halfway. Add milk or half-and-half and stir.
Variation: The tea may be brewed in a teapot, but it will still need to be filtered through a paper filter or very fine nylon strainer. Preheat pot with boiling water and allow steeping time of 6 to 8 minutes before straining.
